scope.summary: Control-listener authorization drops are warn-level and include the computed public mTLS fingerprint and actionable reason.
out_of_scope: Changing TLS authentication policy or exposing certificate bytes.
Claiming a live R1 control-listener run.

entry_points.name: dedicated control authorization drop
entry_points.trace: The authorization rejection helper emits warn-level tracing with computed_principal_key and reason before returning PermissionDenied.

limitations: The source commit also contains unrelated concurrent paths from the shared index; those paths are outside this bead's scope and are recorded rather than claimed as B1b changes.
